records.ety: [F. donneur, OF. daneor, fr. donner. See Donee, and cf. Donator.]

defs: One who gives or bestows; one who confers anything gratuitously; a benefactor. Inverse of recipient.
One who grants an estate; in later use, one who confers a power; -- the opposite of donee.
quotes: Touching, the parties unto deeds and charters, we are to consider as well the donors and granters as the donees or grantees.
